questions.question: How can random number generation be used to prevent an attacker from obtaining the same session ID twice, effectively preventing session fixation attacks?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of pseudorandom number generation

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a 'time-based one-time password' (TOTP) authentication scheme, and how does it prevent common password attacks?
questions.hint: Explain the TOTP algorithm and its application in 2FA

questions.question: Describe the key differences between a 'challenge-response' and 'password-based' entity authentication scheme, including their respective advantages and disadvantages.
questions.hint: Compare and contrast these two authentication mechanisms
